race.comment: KOOLATAH QUEEN (8) resumes and has switched from a Queensland yard on a 73-day return. Will race over further but has the class and won at Flemington his latest jumpout, and Ben Allen sticks from that. Has the inside barrier, and a bold run is likely. MAGNARDO (9) has scored at her last seven starts, most recently by 1.3 lengths over 1200m at this track as favourite. Keep getting better and has a handy 2kg claim. She's a big threat. ICHIBERU (3) dug deep winning this grade at Seymour this trip. Always puts in and looks capable of making the finish.VADERLEE (4) was beaten less than 2L as favourite at Geelong and then tackled a 62 at Stawell and tended to overrace. He'd be a hope if he put his best foot forward.
